race.comment: LORD MOMO (2) has been solid in both runs back this campaign, finishing 3.2L off the winner on the main track here last time out. The wide draw is a niggle, but he's trending in the right direction and further improvement is on the cards third-up. Tongue Tie goes on now and he can go one better. BHULLAR (8) missed by 1.8L over the mile on the main track 57 days ago and hasn't been sighted publicly since. The effort she turned in there stacks up here though and she draws a favourable barrier once again. Can put her best foot forward again. ROYAL TALK (9) is racing in top order recently and is on the quick turnaround from Belmont last week. Azzopardi knows her well and she can't be left out of calculations. OFFENBACH (1) can improve on the fresh run after being a long time off the scene here 14 days ago. Can improve now. BIG MAN ZOR (4) won't be far away.
